description: Environment variable usage that looks like a secret but is a public config URL
diff:
--- a/config.py
+++ b/config.py
@@ -3,4 +3,6 @@ import os
 
 class AppConfig:
     DEBUG = False
+    API_BASE_URL = os.environ["API_BASE"]
+    DOCS_URL = os.environ.get("DOCS_URL", "https://docs.example.com")

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":true,"issues":[],"summary":"Environment variables used for non-secret configuration URLs, no security concern"}
